GenAiPlugin.description: Handles requests to analyze a single specific user in depth. Returns their full profile information, all permission sets (direct and via PSG), permission set groups, object access matrix, and a comprehensive downloadable CSV report. Use when user asks about ONE specific person by name, email, username, or ID.
GenAiPlugin.scope: This topic is focused on analyzing a single specified user comprehensively. It does NOT handle bulk reports or organization-wide analysis — only individual user deep dives. The user must provide an identifier such as username, email, user ID, or full name.
